relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Asking becomes distorted when it serves consumption.
Friendship with the world-system fractures intimacy with the Divine.
Submit to the Divine and resist the adversarial pattern.
Draw near and be met; cleanse hands and purify hearts.
Let shallow laughter turn into honest lament where needed.
Humility before the Lord becomes lifting.
Speaking against a sibling places oneself over the Law.
Only One is Lawgiver and Judge.
Life is a vapor, brief and precious.
Wisdom says, If the Lord wills.
Known good left undone becomes misalignment.

contemplative_note: James 4 turns the heart from grasping to humility: draw near, stop judging siblings, remember life’s vapor, and do the good you know.
